title: Caption Skin
description: A complete captioning recipe. Source fields are authored by humans; the `_built` block is written by `python -m ait.caption.skin_build <name>` and read by use-time consumers (Skin.load, JoyNG, JoySceneDBNG, /v1-status, /todo-ai). Never hand-edit `_built`.

name.description: Skin identifier; must equal the JSON filename stem.

version.description: Schema version this skin was authored against.

user_hint_preamble.description: Wrapper string for per-image user hints; must contain {hint}.

body_type_words.description: Map of authorizing-label -> list of words that may only appear in captions when the label is set. Keys starting with `_` are reserved for human-readable annotations and are ignored by the loader.

require_trigger_presence.description: When true, validators flag captions missing both entity phrases.

concepts.description: Composite categories used by /v1-status and /todo-ai. Keys are concept names; values are match rules.

model.description: AInstallerDB tuple for the base captioning model.

lora.description: Optional AInstallerDB tuple for a fine-tuned LoRA adapter; null = no LoRA.

default_set.description: SceneSet most associated with this skin; default for /v1-status and /todo-ai.

_built.description: Derived state written by the build phase. Optional; loader warns if missing or stale.

token.description: Nonsense-word handle anchored by the LoRA, e.g. 'xlgts'.

phrase.description: Token + descriptor noun, e.g. 'xlgts woman'. Used in label-prompt interpolation.

forbidden.description: Phrases the captioner must not produce when this entity is in scope.

labels.description: Array of label objects in declaration order. Each label has a unique `name`, an optional human-readable `description`, and an `expansion` template (placeholders use {entities.primary.phrase} etc.).

compose.description: Optional context-aware composition rule for this group's labels. When present, `Skin.render_label_prompts` selects verb/subject at render time based on co-occurring labels (e.g. picks 'lies close to' when secondary.pose.lying is also applied). Labels in such a group should additionally carry a `target` field. If absent, the static `expansion` is used unchanged.

kind.description: Which composition strategy this group uses. Only 'subject_verb_by_secondary_pose' is currently implemented.

subject_verb_by_secondary_pose.description: Map of secondary.pose.<leaf> -> {subject, verb}. The first leaf in declaration order that is present in the applied labels wins. `verb` is a fragment like 'lies close to' (no period); placeholders allowed.

default.description: Fallback rule when no entry in the keyed map matches.

template_primary.description: Sentence template used when the selected rule has subject='primary'. Placeholders: {entities.primary.phrase}, {entities.secondary.phrase}, {verb}, {target}.

template_secondary.description: Sentence template used when the selected rule has subject='secondary'. Placeholders: {entities.primary.phrase}, {entities.secondary.phrase}, {verb}, {target}.

subject.description: Which entity is the grammatical subject of the rendered sentence.

verb.description: Verb fragment, e.g. 'lies close to'. May contain {entities.secondary.phrase} etc.

name.description: Unique label identifier (used as the SceneImage label key).

description.description: Human-readable note: what this label means and when to apply it.

expansion.description: Label-prompt template — the sentence inserted into the model prompt when this label is on an image. Placeholders are interpolated at build time. When the enclosing group has a `compose` rule, this expansion is used only as a static fallback (e.g. for tools that don't call render_label_prompts).

target.description: Body-part phrase (e.g. 'her mouth') used as the {target} placeholder in compose templates. Required when the enclosing group has a `compose` rule; ignored otherwise.

migration.description: Accumulating log of migration notes. Each entry is a free-text string prefixed with an ISO-8601 CET/CEST timestamp with seconds, e.g. `'2026-05-10T20:30:42+02:00: renamed from b_muscular; SceneImages tagged with the old name should be relabeled before training'`. New notes are appended; the list is cleared only by a manual flush (TBD).

ignore_labels.description: For residual concepts: labels in this list don't qualify an image for the residual match (e.g. attribute-only images shouldn't trigger `general`).

ignore_label_prefix.description: For residual concepts: labels with these prefixes don't qualify an image for the residual match.

source_hash.description: SHA-256 of the source fields used to compose this build.

directive.description: Composed canonical recipe text sent to both system and user roles.

labels.description: Flat lookup of label PATH -> rendered (placeholder-interpolated) sentence. Paths are `<entity>.<group>.<leaf>`.
